_comment: Phase 108i — BOQ client vocabulary overlay. The _default block applies to every project. Add an employer name as a new key to add client-specific phrasing; those entries override the defaults. Whole-word, case-insensitive replacement. Used by BOQParagraphEnhancer.ApplyClientVocabulary (flag: BOQTenderConfig.UseClientVocabulary).

Ministry of Defence (UK).or approved equivalent: to the MOD Standard or approved equivalent

Uganda National Roads Authority.Supply and install: Supply, deliver, install and make good
